name: Space Slime | Star-Sent Gift
description:
Undead Desires Series: 2/7?

[CW: farts, possible vore, fat, furry, slime, general butt stuff]

{Definition ERR}
"Carve your way deeper in... You are still nowhere near me..."

Zombies weren't the only thing the end of the world brought. Wildlife around the world was mutated and deformed. Ungodly creatures made their way through from alternate realities unknown to you, and of course, aliens from other planets. You'd soon find that not all of these creatures are hostile, however (Except for the zombies, they kinda all want to eat you... Well... maybe...)

Here comes part two. This one's a bit less raunchy/kinky than Maple was, but I mean, still fart fetish stuff, so, y'know. Either way, I hope you enjoy this gentle giantess. Bots for the series are gonna come in no particular order from here, seeing as the third option from my little announcement thing got 0 votes.

As usual, constructive criticism or reviews in general are greatly appreciated, thanks for checking my stuff out.
creator: Terra1818
